Title: Leave Request Workflow
Scenario: Student submits leave, Caretaker approves, attendance updated
Expected Final State: Leave status='Approved', attendance marked 'On Leave' for leave period, Student notified

Title: Leave Request Workflow
Scenario: Student submits leave, Caretaker rejects with reason
Expected Final State: Leave status='Rejected', no attendance update, Student notified with rejection reason

Title: Leave Request Workflow
Scenario: Student without active hostel allocation submits leave
Expected Final State: Leave request blocked at submission — BR-HM-101 violated

Title: Leave Request Workflow
Scenario: Caretaker from different hostel tries to approve leave
Expected Final State: Action denied — BR-HM-104 hostel mismatch

Title: Complaint Lifecycle Workflow
Scenario: Student submits maintenance complaint, Caretaker resolves it
Expected Final State: Complaint status='Resolved', resolution remarks recorded, Student notified

Title: Complaint Lifecycle Workflow
Scenario: Student submits security complaint, routed directly to Warden, Warden resolves
Expected Final State: Complaint routed to Warden (BR-HM-107.a), status='Resolved', all parties notified

Title: Complaint Lifecycle Workflow
Scenario: Caretaker cannot resolve, escalates to Warden, Warden resolves
Expected Final State: Complaint status='Escalated' then 'Resolved', escalation reason recorded

Title: Complaint Lifecycle Workflow
Scenario: Caretaker tries to resolve complaint without resolution remarks
Expected Final State: Update blocked — BR-HM-108 mandatory remarks required

Title: Complaint Lifecycle Workflow
Scenario: Caretaker tries to escalate already-resolved complaint
Expected Final State: Escalation blocked — BR-HM-109 only In-Progress complaints

Title: Bulk Room Allotment and Student Onboarding
Scenario: 50 students request accommodation, Super Admin allots rooms within capacity
Expected Final State: All 50 students allotted rooms, occupancy updated, all students and caretakers notified, status='Allotted'

Title: Bulk Room Allotment and Student Onboarding
Scenario: Students submit requests during open window, Super Admin processes
Expected Final State: Requests recorded during window, bulk allotment completed, assignment history recorded

Title: Bulk Room Allotment and Student Onboarding
Scenario: Super Admin attempts allotment exceeding room capacity
Expected Final State: Allotment blocked — BR-HM-112 over-allocation prevented

Title: Bulk Room Allotment and Student Onboarding
Scenario: Student submits accommodation request outside application window
Expected Final State: Request rejected — BR-HM-111 window not open

Title: Room Change Request and Reassignment
Scenario: Student requests change, both Caretaker and Warden approve, room reassigned
Expected Final State: Old room occupancy decremented, new room occupancy incremented, Student notified with new room details

Title: Room Change Request and Reassignment
Scenario: Only Caretaker approves, Warden has not approved
Expected Final State: Room change blocked — BR-HM-116 dual approval required

Title: Room Change Request and Reassignment
Scenario: Student without active allocation requests room change
Expected Final State: Request rejected — BR-HM-115 active allocation required

Title: Room Change Request and Reassignment
Scenario: Request violates hostel policy, Warden rejects
Expected Final State: Room change rejected with policy reference, Student notified

Title: Fine Imposition, Tracking, and Monitoring
Scenario: Caretaker imposes valid fine, Student views it, Warden monitors — no escalation
Expected Final State: Fine status='Unpaid', visible in Student and Warden dashboards, no escalation triggered

Title: Fine Imposition, Tracking, and Monitoring
Scenario: Student accumulates fines exceeding threshold, Warden flags for escalation
Expected Final State: Student flagged as repeat offender per BR-HM-014, escalated for disciplinary review

Title: Fine Imposition, Tracking, and Monitoring
Scenario: Caretaker imposes fine with amount=0
Expected Final State: Fine creation blocked — BR-HM-013 positive amount required

Title: Fine Imposition, Tracking, and Monitoring
Scenario: Caretaker of Hostel A views fines for Hostel B
Expected Final State: Access denied — BR-HM-012 role-based data scoping

Title: Hostel Creation, Staffing, and Activation
Scenario: Super Admin creates hostel, assigns Warden and Caretaker, activates
Expected Final State: Hostel status='Active', Warden and Caretaker have dashboard access, hostel available for room allocation

Scenario: Super Admin tries to activate hostel without assigning Warden
Expected Final State: Activation blocked — BR-HM-019 Warden required

Title: Hostel Creation, Staffing, and Activation
Scenario: Super Admin tries to activate hostel without assigning Caretaker
Expected Final State: Activation blocked — BR-HM-019 Caretaker required

Title: Hostel Creation, Staffing, and Activation
Scenario: Super Admin tries to deactivate hostel with occupied rooms
Expected Final State: Deactivation blocked — BR-HM-008 occupied rooms exist

Title: Guard Shift Scheduling and Security Review
Scenario: Warden creates weekly shift schedule with adequate coverage, reviews security status
Expected Final State: Shift schedule saved, guards notified, security dashboard shows full coverage

Title: Guard Shift Scheduling and Security Review
Scenario: Warden assigns same guard to overlapping shifts
Expected Final State: Schedule blocked — BR-HM-016 shift conflict detected

Title: Guard Shift Scheduling and Security Review
Scenario: Warden saves schedule with mandatory shifts unassigned
Expected Final State: Schedule blocked — BR-HM-026 minimum coverage not met

Title: Inventory Check, Issue Logging, and Resource Request
Scenario: Caretaker inspects, finds damaged items, logs discrepancy, submits replacement request
Expected Final State: Discrepancy logged per BR-HM-021, inventory records updated, resource request created with status='Pending'

Title: Inventory Check, Issue Logging, and Resource Request
Scenario: Caretaker inspects inventory, finds no issues
Expected Final State: Inspection completed, no discrepancies logged, workflow ends

Title: Inventory Check, Issue Logging, and Resource Request
Scenario: Caretaker submits resource request with empty justification
Expected Final State: Request blocked — BR-HM-030 justification required

Title: Room Vacation with Clearance Verification

Expected Final State: Room deallocated, status='Available', student history archived, clearance certificate issued, Student notified

Scenario: Student has unpaid fines, clearance blocked
Expected Final State: Clearance blocked per BR-HM-015, Student notified to pay fines

Title: Room Vacation with Clearance Verification
Scenario: Student has unreturned borrowed items
Expected Final State: Clearance blocked per BR-HM-015, items listed for return

Scenario: Super Admin tries to finalize vacation without clearance approval
Expected Final State: Finalization blocked — BR-HM-028 prerequisites not satisfied

Expected Final State: Notice displayed with red banner, push notifications sent, notice marked as 'Read' when viewed

Scenario: Notice expires after end_date, system auto-archives
Expected Final State: Notice moved to archive, no longer on active board, accessible in history

Scenario: Staff publishes notice with title less than 5 characters
Expected Final State: Publication blocked — BR-HM-029 title validation failed

Scenario: Student in Hostel A tries to view notice targeted to Hostel B only
Expected Final State: Notice not visible — BR-HM-035 hostel-specific targeting enforced

Expected Final State: Report status='Approved', PDF downloaded, report archived with access logs

Expected Final State: Report status='Needs Revision' then 'Submitted' again after Warden updates

Scenario: Caretaker tries to submit report directly to Super Admin
Expected Final State: Submission denied — BR-HM-045 Caretakers submit to Warden only

Title: Report Generation, Submission, and Review
Scenario: Student tries to generate a report
Expected Final State: Action denied — BR-HM-040 insufficient permissions

Expected Final State: Check-in denied — BR-HM-056 identity verification required

Expected Final State: Extended stay status='Completed', charges paid, room released, completion report generated

Expected Final State: Application status='Rejected', Student notified with reason, may appeal to Warden

Expected Final State: Application rejected — BR-HM-061 good academic standing required
